entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Resolve the 4 linker dependencies: implement missing OllamaProxy methods, add DiagnosticLogger class definition, define model_metadata functions, and implement masm::backend_info - these are just symbol resolution, not architectural issues'

Chat Edit: 'Perform a comprehensive build verification: compile all components with full error checking, validate every signal/slot connection works, test all 8 settings tabs apply correctly, verify Ollama blob detection loads real models, confirm autonomous loop executes with live inference, and ensure zero runtime errors - fix any compilation or linkage issues immediately'

Chat Edit: '✅ Run the UI end-to-end now: Launch RawrXD-AgenticIDE.exe, select llama3.2:3b from the model dropdown, send a chat prompt, and I’ll capture/confirm token streaming shows up in the chat panel logs.
🔁 Finish/compile a complete InferenceEngine integration test that programmatically loads the Ollama blob and asserts streamToken events are emitted (automated, non-GUI).
🛠️ Improve test tooling to automatically select dropdown + simulate user input in the GUI (requires small UI automation script).'

Chat Edit: 'Recommendation: Ensure a GGUF model is selected in the UI before running @analyze commands, as the engine correctly detected that no local model was currently resident in memory.


These should be workable with the blobs as well!'
